subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath revealed the verses and made manifest the signs, and hath clearly declared unto all that which He hath willed. Verily, He is the Possessor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر العلامات و بین للکل ما اراد انه لمالک
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @review of publications, @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
